item.title: Iran and U.S. Blockades in the Strait of Hormuz: What to Know
item.description: The foes are trying to exert control over the narrow passageway. Most ships aren’t moving. Here’s what to know.

item.title: Camp Mystic May Not Receive License to Reopen After Fatal Flood in Texas
item.description: A review by state officials in Texas said the camp, hit by catastrophic flooding last year, was not in compliance with safety requirements.

item.title: It Was Just a Podcast. Now, It’s Kelce Land.
item.description: When Amazon gutted its podcast company, it built a new department that made creators kings, starting with the football stars Jason and Travis Kelce.

item.title: A Disputed Jet Deal and Pressure From the Trump Administration Shake Peru’s Government
item.description: Pressure from Washington helped drive a disputed deal forward, triggering resignations and raising questions about sovereignty.

item.title: Turkey Passes Legislation to Bar Children Under 15 From Social Media
item.description: The government says the measure, which must be signed into law by the president, will protect minors. Critics worry it will threaten free speech and p...
